column1: For our final goals, we want the microspheres to have high drug content and EE to load
more drugs into the preparation and have a small mean diameter and initial release to aid the
usage of such drugs. In the numerical optimization process, all goals of the three factors (X1-
X3) were set as "in range", the goals of Y1 and Y2 were set as "maximize" and the goals of Y3
and Y4 were set as "minimize", and the other parameters were set by default.
